programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a v

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After a father takes police on a high-speed chase with his toddler on board, K9 Keanu is deployed into a volatile standoff and every second counts. K9 Kyro tracks down the critical piece of evidence: a gun tossed by a fleeing suspect. K9 Lupo pushes through dense, punishing brush, getting tangled under low branches but refuses to quit, fighting through to make the apprehension. Meanwhile, after sa

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Shep and his handler became a nationwide sensation after their body cam footage went viral; K9 Robby steps aside, giving rookie K9 Seff the chance to step up and make the collar; K9 Jax and his handler are locked in a standoff with a suspect perched in a tree, refusing to come down and forcing deputies to wait him out for hours; K9 Mercury proves he's far more than a one-purpose narcotics dog w

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Every search has a conclusion: whether it's finding a missing person or chasing a suspect on the run, a police K9 makes sure it ends with answers; K9 Pandora wastes no time bringing relief to a desperate family looking for a family member; K9s Jet and Cheney tag-team a fugitive who tears up the roadway and refuses to stop; K9 Karma shuts down a belligerent man fighting arrest; and K-9 Endo follows

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Cisco responds to a break-in at the last place you'd ever expect - the Fraternal Order of Police Lodge while K9 Karma is deployed on a combative suspect who refuses to go quietly into the night. After his handler is struck by a vehicle, K9 Jakko continues on the pursuit alone, locking onto the trail of an armed suspect and when K9 Mickey makes the takedown, he pays a painful price in the proces

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the v

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: As the sun goes down in a quiet farm town, K9 Rico is deployed to track down a man accused of strangling his neighbor; meanwhile, K9 Clooney springs into action when a desperate suspect makes a bold, shocking move-stealing a police cruiser in a last-ditch attempt to escape; K9 Murphy teams up with the aviation unit, combining forces in a relentless search for a suspect who fled after leading offic

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Lord and his handler are award-winning trackers-but this call is more than just skill, it's about teamwork as they push the pursuit over a fence and close in on a suspect; meanwhile, K9 Bingo chases down an allegedly armed suspect who has fled into a crowded public park; in the dead of night, K9 Odin searches for the driver of a reported stolen vehicle and K9 Holmes and Baro tag team to help fl

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: In Texas, everything's bigger, except the hiding spots, and K9 Enzo proves it, locking onto a suspect wedged beneath a house; on the graveyard shift, rookie K9 Deebo steps up and shows he's the real deal; in Florida, officers shut down traffic for a high-stakes helicopter landing, rushing K9 Huk to an emergency hospital; elsewhere, K9 Diesel plunges headfirst into dark waters in pursuit of a suspe

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Just months from retirement, K9 Tasja is sent into a sprawling hotel with over 140 rooms, endless hiding spots and one suspect who refuses to be found; in another urgent search, K9 Midnight is called in to find a missing boy.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect makes it clear he's not stopping for anyone, it's up to K9 Murphy's speed and determination to bring the chase to an end; K9 Bear's bomb-detection training is suddenly put to the test when explosives detonate in the middle of the night; after eluding police for weeks, a naked fugitive is on the run again; K9 Eddie is called in, and the pursuit ends exactly as his training predicts;

programme.title: Just Eats With Chef JJ

programme.title: New Soul Kitchen Remix
programme.desc: In this episode of New Soul Kitchen Remix Chef takes us on a culinary journey into the heart of New Orleans culture to master the ultimate Big Easy staple, Dirty Rice. He keeps it authentic with Cajun spice and ground meat, and a little heat.

programme.title: New Soul Kitchen Remix
programme.desc: "Chef Jernard brings Italy straight to your kitchen with a Penne pasta dish. It starts with Italian sausage, mixed with flavorful marinara sauce. But it's the four cheeses that tie this dish together: Ricotta, Provolone, Mozzarella, & Parmesan.".

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Rashonda and Eric want an outdoor paradise. Jake builds an air condition unit cover. Jazz adds an outdoor rug, furniture, and fire pit. For the reveal Jake makes Salmon Steaks Baked with Alfredo Sauce. Jazz bakes Mini Cheesecakes topped with fruit.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Stacy and the family want the ultimate family room. Jake builds a large chalkboard while Jazz finds jumbo games that double as decorations. For the reveal, Jake makes Caribbean & Mexican Chicken Enchiladas. Jazz bakes off Chunky Monster Cookies.
